headline: Bank Of America’s OCIO Leadership And AI Financing Set Against Valuation
summary: Bank of America has been ranked the top outsourced chief investment office provider for nonprofits globally, highlighting its role with mission focused institutions. The bank is also at the center of a potential $14b financing package for Oracle's new AI focused data center project in Michigan, which supports Oracle and OpenAI cloud infrastructure build out. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, these developments sit alongside a share price of $51.88 and a 42.8% return over the past year. Over...

headline: Microsoft & Oracle have a 'tremendous opportunity' in the AI boom
summary: Baird tech strategist Ted Mortonson chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman to explain how the software (IGV) sector's scrutiny will resume now that the Iran war is easing, and why he thinks a few key names have what it takes to survive the artificial intelligence (AI) disruption trade.

content.title: Microsoft & Oracle have a 'tremendous opportunity' in the AI boom
content.description: Baird tech strategist Ted Mortonson chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman to explain how the software (IGV) sector's scrutiny will resume now that the Iran war is easing, and why he thinks a few key names have what it takes to survive the artificial intelligence (AI) disruption trade.
content.summary: Baird tech strategist Ted Mortonson chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman to explain how the software (IGV) sector's scrutiny will resume now that the Iran war is easing, and why he thinks a few key names have what it takes to survive the artificial intelligence (AI) disruption trade.

headline: Oracle Brings New AI Agent-Driven Capabilities to its Industry-Leading Financial Crime and Compliance Portfolio
summary: AI World – Oracle continues to strengthen its financial crime and compliance portfolio with new AI capabilities that accelerate investigations, insights, and results. By securing rights to technology from Lucinity, whose platform delivers AI agent-driven capabilities for financial crime prevention, Oracle will further enhance its industry-leading Financial Crime and Compliance Management (FCCM) portfolio with a new generation of AI agent-driven capabilities.

content.title: Oracle Brings New AI Agent-Driven Capabilities to its Industry-Leading Financial Crime and Compliance Portfolio
content.summary: AI World – Oracle continues to strengthen its financial crime and compliance portfolio with new AI capabilities that accelerate investigations, insights, and results. By securing rights to technology from Lucinity, whose platform delivers AI agent-driven capabilities for financial crime prevention, Oracle will further enhance its industry-leading Financial Crime and Compliance Management (FCCM) portfolio with a new generation of AI agent-driven capabilities.

headline: Oracle AI Database Raises the Bar for Availability and Security Across Mission-Critical Workloads
summary: Oracle AI World Tour -- Oracle today announced a comprehensive series of enhancements to Oracle AI Database. These enhancements help customers achieve extreme availability and security for all database applications, and always-on, stock-exchange level availability for their most critical workloads without requiring application changes or extensive in-house expertise.

content.title: Oracle AI Database Raises the Bar for Availability and Security Across Mission-Critical Workloads
content.summary: Oracle AI World Tour -- Oracle today announced a comprehensive series of enhancements to Oracle AI Database. These enhancements help customers achieve extreme availability and security for all database applications, and always-on, stock-exchange level availability for their most critical workloads without requiring application changes or extensive in-house expertise.

headline: Oracle Introduces Fusion Agentic Applications for HR
summary: Oracle AI World Tour -- Oracle today announced Fusion Agentic Applications for HR. The new agentic applications are powered by coordinated teams of specialized AI agents that are outcome-driven, proactive, reasoning-based, and engineered for enterprise execution.
